description_long: This is a small, enclosed grave plot featuring a single upright headstone made of gray stone, set on a rectangular base. The grave is surrounded by a decorative black wrought iron fence with swirling motifs, enclosing two rectangular grassy plots separated by a paved walkway. The headstone includes an engraved portrait and Cyrillic inscriptions, indicating it is a personalized memorial. The paved area around the grave is composed of light gray tiles, providing a clean and orderly appearance. The overall design is simple yet respectful, with the iron fencing serving both as a boundary and a decorative element. The grave plot is suitable for placement in an urban cemetery or memorial park.
description: A small grave plot with a gray stone headstone, decorative black wrought iron fencing, and two grassy sections separated by a paved walkway.
description_view_0: View of the grave plot from the side, showing the iron fence, grassy plots, and the headstone's profile.
description_view_1: Frontal view highlighting the engraved headstone with portrait and inscriptions, as well as the layout of the grassy and paved areas.
description_view_2: Angled rear-side view showing the headstone's thickness, the iron fence, and the full extent of the grassy plots.
description_view_3: Rear view of the grave plot, displaying the back of the headstone and the iron fence's decorative pattern.
